case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. SAMUEL A PEREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, SAMUEL A AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-28-2019
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-17-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 200008500) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, SAMUEL A AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100036669), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED AUG-08-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE AUG-09-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, SAMUEL A AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-17-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-05-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-17-2019 CONTINUED TO NOV-05-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST RYAN E. VOS, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-17-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-15-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-05-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2019 Continued To Nov-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Nov-05-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
